audit.summary: Extraction is faithful to the live page. Hero, intro, press quotes (4), testimonials (6 with full data), and 3 feature-split sections all reproduce live content accurately. The testimonials section title 'Ils témoignent' is a reasonable inference though not explicitly present in HTML. No major omissions or hallucinations detected.
